# JannMat

> The real-time pulse of Indian democracy. Track live public sentiment, compare leaders, and explore democratic insights across India.

## About

JannMat surfaces live voting sentiment, leader comparisons, regional trends, and analytics for Indian politics. Use the paths below as the canonical entry points for public content.

## Main pages

- [Home](/): Live sentiment overview and entry to the product.
- [Compare leaders](/compare): Side-by-side leader comparison.
- [Regions](/regions): Regional political trends across India.
- [Insights](/insights): Election insights and public opinion analytics.
- [Vote](/vote): Cast your stance on national leaders (interactive).

## Leader profiles

Leader detail pages live at `/leaders/{id}` where `{id}` is the leader’s stable identifier in JannMat.

## Machine-readable discovery

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): All indexable public URLs, including leader profile pages.
- [Robots policy](/robots.txt): Crawling rules for search engines and bots.

## Optional

- [Login](/login): Account sign-in (authentication; not primary editorial content).
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Signed-in user dashboard (private to authenticated users).
